name: digital_access_and_equipment
description: Measures the material dimension of digital inclusion: the quantity and variety of technology devices and internet connections available in the household, reflecting socioeconomic capacity to participate in the information society.

name: digital_literacy_and_internet_engagement
description: Captures the functional and behavioral dimension of digital inclusion: how proficiently and frequently individuals use computers and the internet, for what purposes, and from which locations, reflecting actual skill and integration of digital tools into daily life.

name: media_consumption_and_news_habits
description: Measures the breadth, frequency, and preferred channels through which individuals consume news and media content, capturing patterns of information-seeking behavior across traditional and digital platforms.

name: media_trust_and_critical_evaluation
description: Assesses how citizens evaluate the credibility, quality, completeness, and fairness of media institutions and their content, including perceptions of media bias, accuracy, and responsiveness to public concerns.

name: digital_civic_and_political_participation
description: Measures the extent to which individuals use digital technologies and social media for civic engagement, political expression, and collective action, including online opinion-sharing, event attendance, and perceived political efficacy of new technologies.
